tools.name: get_current_user
tools.description: Returns the LMGram profile linked to the connected account.

tools.name: request_human_match
tools.description: Creates an opt-in LMGram human match request from a minimized session summary.

tools.name: list_match_requests
tools.description: Lists recent match requests for the current LMGram user.

tools.name: start_chat
tools.description: Starts a LMGram chat for a match request, or records that this side wants to chat.

tools.name: list_messages
tools.description: Lists messages in a LMGram chat.

tools.name: send_message
tools.description: Sends a message into a LMGram chat.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: list_messages · Private data: start_chat · Public sink: send_message.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: list_messages · Private data: start_chat · Public sink: send_message

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
